metadata.description: Verification-first reasoning discipline for Claude Opus models, distilled from audited reasoning-trace analysis

plugins.name: fable-grade-reasoning
plugins.description: A verification-first thinking discipline for code generation, mathematical derivation, and AI-research mathematics. Targets Claude Opus-family models (built-in model gate skips Fable/Mythos-class models). Every rule is backed by a documented failure case.
